source.name: LLM-generated architecture and engineering briefing (user provided)

entities.name: HL7 FHIR
entities.notes: Real standard; briefing assumes national endpoints and webhook interoperability but does not specify AU implementation details (HI Service/My Health Record/vendor gateway).

entities.name: SNOMED CT
entities.notes: Real terminology; briefing requires deterministic retrieval of codes but provides no terminology server choice, licensing, or subset strategy.

entities.name: ICD-11
entities.notes: Real classification; briefing assumes direct retrievability via API without specifying source.

entities.name: LOINC
mentioned_as: LOINC to semantic text Translation Layers
entities.notes: Real coding system; briefing requires LOINC mapping and delta checking but does not specify dataset source or licensing constraints.

entities.name: W3C Verifiable Credentials / ZKP wallets (concept)
entities.notes: Partially real: W3C VC is real; ZKP wallet interoperability is not a single standard. Briefing assumes an off-the-shelf payload + verifier.

entities.name: TLS 1.3
entities.notes: Real; used as security requirement.

entities.name: Keccak-256
entities.notes: Real; briefing assumes medicolegal hashing scheme but does not specify canonicalization/signing inputs.

entities.name: Individual Healthcare Identifier (IHI)
entities.notes: AU-specific identifier; briefing assumes a queryable 'national endpoint' via FHIR.

entities.name: Emergency escalation instruction: call 000
entities.notes: AU-specific emergency call number; included in triage output text.

entities.name: AHA PREVENT
entities.notes: Real risk model (US-oriented). In AU deployment this is likely out-of-scope unless explicitly justified.

entities.name: AusCVDRisk
entities.notes: AU cardiovascular risk tool; briefing assumes an API or deterministic implementation exists.

entities.name: Choosing Wisely
entities.notes: Real guideline initiative; briefing assumes queryable corpus for test utility.

entities.name: Therapeutic Guidelines (eTG)
entities.notes: Licensed AU prescribing guidance; briefing assumes availability for RAG.

entities.name: MIMS
entities.notes: Commercial drug info; briefing assumes regulatory-approved clinical pharmacology API.

entities.name: Lexicomp
entities.notes: Commercial drug info; often not AU-native. Briefing assumes availability and an API contract.

entities.name: PROM (Patient-Reported Outcome Measure)
entities.notes: Real concept; briefing assumes a standardized question bank keyed by diagnosis.

entities.name: Webhooks for asynchronous results
entities.notes: Real pattern; requires explicit event bus/webhook security design.

entities.name: Kafka/RabbitMQ (event bus)
entities.notes: Real products; mentioned as options without selection.

entities.name: AWS/GCP
entities.notes: Real clouds; referenced for IaC but no target chosen.

entities.name: shell-matrix-agent
entities.notes: Appears as an internal repo/service name in briefing; no evidence it exists.
